working_on.task: Completed stabilization and session persistence fixes
working_on.notes: Admin reporting is now fully functional with PDF/CSV export. Session persistence is rock solid after refresh.

Optional feature to list all historical fines

recent_changes.description: Fixed Prisma syntax errors in ReportService and frontend getMe data mapping
Stabilized Auth session persistence on refresh and fixed JSON parse errors
Implemented complete Admin Reporting System with CSV/PDF exports

errors_encountered.error: Prisma: Invalid comparison GT on nested field
errors_encountered.solution: Updated query logic to compare static dates calculated via date-fns

errors_encountered.error: json2csv: TypeError Class extends value undefined
errors_encountered.solution: Replaced with PapaParse for browser-side CSV generation

errors_encountered.error: AuthHook: SyntaxError 'undefined' is not valid JSON
errors_encountered.solution: Added guard for 'undefined' and 'null' strings in localStorage before parsing

decisions_made.reason: Avoids Node.js stream dependencies in browser environment
Prevents unauthorized flashes and 'văng ra login' on page refresh
